incoming.title: Incoming referrals
incoming.subtitle: Referrals sent to your hospital
incoming.emptyDescription: Referrals sent from other hospitals will appear here.

outgoing.title: Outgoing referrals
outgoing.subtitle: Referrals your hospital has sent
outgoing.emptyDescription: Refer a patient to another hospital to get started.

newPage.title: New referral
newPage.subtitle: Send a patient to another hospital
newPage.registerFirst: Register this patient from the Patients section, then return here to refer.

fields.clinicalSummaryPlaceholder: History, key findings, interventions so far, working diagnosis.
fields.clinicalSummaryHelper: The receiving team will see this summary along with the patient's national record.

detail.loadError: Referral not found or not accessible.
detail.crossHospitalLocked: Accept this referral to unlock read access to the patient's records from the sending hospital. Current status: {{status}}.
detail.crossHospitalEmpty: No records found at the sending hospital.

accept.title: Accept referral
accept.description: Accepting will grant your hospital read-only access to the patient's records from the sending hospital.
accept.notePlaceholder: Optional note to the referring team.

reject.title: Reject referral
reject.description: The referring hospital will be notified. Access to the patient's records will NOT be granted.

complete.title: Mark referral completed
complete.description: Use once the patient's care under this referral is complete. Access to shared records remains.

cancel.title: Cancel referral
cancel.description: Only the sending hospital can cancel. The receiving hospital's access is revoked.
